title: Two Column Insight
narrativeSummary: Use one side for the main argument and the other for compact supporting evidence.

narrativeItems.title: Lead with the answer
narrativeItems.description: State the judgment first, then explain it through structured evidence.

narrativeItems.title: Evidence discipline
narrativeItems.description: Keep evidence selective so the two columns do not become dense tables.

narrativeItems.title: Clear handoff
narrativeItems.description: Close with a concise callout that naturally leads into the next slide.

evidenceCards.title: Scale shift
evidenceCards.description: Use compact metric cards to show movement and relative position.

evidenceCards.title: Structural gap
evidenceCards.description: Break complex facts into two to four lightweight evidence cards.

evidenceCards.title: Operating signal
evidenceCards.description: Keep key judgments editable instead of burying them in long prose.

conclusion: Use this page to explain one argument and support it with a few focused facts.
